canonical_definition: The RESISC45 dataset is a publicly available benchmark for Remote Sensing Image Scene Classification (RESISC), containing 45 scene classes.
papers: Can Large Language Models Tackle Graph Partitioning?
CoVoGER: A Multilingual Multitask Benchmark for Speech-to-text Generative Error Correction with Large Language Models
